calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Smmons By Deft; Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Aug-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT LOLA BURGESS' Motion To Quash Service Of Smmons IS DENIED AS MOOT GIVEN THAT PLAINTIFF DOES NOT ASSERT THE MAILING CHALLENGED BY DEFENDANT CONSTITUTED VALID SERVICE. = Opposing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(301/PJB)
